---
title: "R and clinical/lab data"
subtitle: "2026 edition"
author: "Matteo Miotto"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
documentclass: book
bibliography: []
description: "A practical R course on how to handle clinical/lab data"
link-citations: yes
---

```{r, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  comment = "",
  class.output = "code-out",
  out.width = "85%",
  dev='png',
  fig.height = 7, 
  fig.width = 7, 
  fig.align='center'
  
)
```

# Welcome {-}

Welcome to this course, here you can find the notebooks used in the PhD course of 2026.
